title: Invisible Thread - Clear, 200m
features: If the thread or straight stitch is not visible
Can also be used as wire
description: If the thread or straight stitch is not visible. Gütermann Sulky Invisible 200 m is a very thin but tear-resistant monofilament thread. Always ready when something invisible to embroider, like sequins, cord threads, a ribbon, beads, etc., choose the invisible. During quilting, the transparent thread allows you to see the color of the fabric from anywhere. For light primary colors choose the transparent finish, for dark colors and wear the smoky. Product features: 100% polyamide. Elastic and tear-resistant. Can also be used as a subwire. Length: 200 m. Thickness: DTEX 215 x 1 Recommended needle size: NM 75/80. 2 colours: smoky and transparent 100% polyamide. Elastic and tear-resistant. Can also be used as a subwire. Length: 200 m.
